mapper.insert: insert into batch.data_asset ( tenant_id, asset_code, asset_type, display_name, owner_job_code ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{assetCode}, #{assetType}, #{displayName}, #{ownerJobCode} ) on conflict (tenant_id, asset_code, asset_type) do update set display_name = excluded.display_name, owner_job_code = excluded.owner_job_code, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into batch.asset_partition ( tenant_id, asset_id, asset_code, partition_key, biz_date, freshness_status, result_version_id, business_key, job_instance_id, effective_at, payload_storage, payload_ref ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{assetId}, #{assetCode}, #{partitionKey}, #{bizDate}, 'EFFECTIVE', #{resultVersionId}, #{businessKey}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{effectiveAt}, #{payloadStorage}, #{payloadRef} ) on conflict (tenant_id, asset_code, partition_key) do update set asset_id = excluded.asset_id, biz_date = excluded.biz_date, freshness_status = excluded.freshness_status, result_version_id = excluded.result_version_id, business_key = excluded.business_key, job_instance_id = excluded.job_instance_id, effective_at = excluded.effective_at, payload_storage = excluded.payload_storage, payload_ref = excluded.payload_ref, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select ap.tenant_id, ap.asset_code, ap.biz_date, ap.partition_key, ap.business_key, ap.freshness_status, rv.version_no, ap.job_instance_id, ap.payload_storage, rv.payload_json::text as payload_json, ap.payload_ref from batch.asset_partition ap left join batch.result_version rv on rv.tenant_id = ap.tenant_id and rv.id = ap.result_version_id where ap.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ap.asset_code = #{assetCode} and ap.partition_key = #{partitionKey} and ap.freshness_status = 'EFFECTIVE' limit 1
